notes: [New] Nexus system — 7 territory points, claim/defend/clash combat
[New] Nexus quests — 2 daily + 2 weekly (claim & charge), unlocked at level 10
[New] 8 new creatures — Dragon and Bug types with 4-stage evolution lines
[New] 6 new spawn zones — Mount Chiliad, Raton Canyon, Tongva Hills, Galilee, Port of LS, Paleto Bay
[New] Biome-based type filtering — creatures only spawn in biomes that fit their type (Config.BiomeTypeAllowed)
[New] Custom map support — server owners can plug in their own tile sets via Config.CustomMap
[New] Creature HP system — creatures take damage in Nexus combat, can faint at 0 HP
[New] 3 new shop items — Potion ($100, +20 HP), Super Potion ($250, +50 HP), Revive ($200, brings fainted back at 50 HP)
[New] 4 new languages — German (de), French (fr), Dutch (nl), Brazilian Portuguese (pt-BR); Turkish completed
[New] Berry Bait now also recharges Nexus signal
[New] Berry Bait is now single-throw — effect lasts only for the next throw
[New] Guided tour redesigned — shorter, hands-on, ends with a guaranteed shiny catch + evolution demo
[Balance] Tour creature IV capped at 0-7 per stat (max ~46% total)
[Balance] Quest pool is now level-gated — locked quests no longer waste daily slots
[Improvement] Map markers reworked — visual polish + correct positioning fixes
[Fix] In-vehicle warning banner no longer overlaps the weather button
